scripts.build:flutter-solo-pool: npm run kill:dev && cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --bin arqma_flutter_solo_pool
scripts.build:flutter-solo-pool:release: npm run kill:dev && cargo build --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml --release --bin arqma_flutter_solo_pool
scripts.tauri:dev: npm run kill:dev && npm run ensure-dist && node scripts/with-rust-target.mjs tauri dev
scripts.tauri:build: npm run kill:dev && node scripts/with-rust-target.mjs tauri build
scripts.tauri:build:local: npm run kill:dev && node scripts/with-rust-target.mjs tauri build -- --profile local
scripts.ci:tauri:native: npm run copy:bins && npm run build && npm run kill:dev && node scripts/with-rust-target.mjs tauri build
scripts.ci:tauri:native:windows-gnu: npm run copy:bins && npm run build && npm run kill:dev && node scripts/with-rust-target.mjs npx tauri build --runner ../scripts/cargo-runner-gnu-flat-sync.cmd -- --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu
scripts.ci:tauri:local: npm run copy:bins && npm run build && npm run tauri:build:local
scripts.release:win: npm run copy:bins && npm run build && node scripts/with-rust-target.mjs cargo build --release -p arqma-wallet --target x86_64-pc-windows-gnu && node scripts/postbuild-rename-windows.mjs
